package_salary.ppo_ctc: CTC 8.4 LPA (Rs 66,640 in hand) from day one

selection_process_steps: • Pre-orientation session for the registered candidates. Planning for 300
• Online assessment for all the registered candidates in the first half.
• Results to be announced post lunch.
• Selected candidates to appear for a programming test in the second half.
• Selected candidates for the interview rounds to be announced later in the
• F2F Interview with the shortlisted candidates
• Offer Role Out to the final shortlisted candidates post lunch
